heroImageAlt: Split-screen visualization comparing a large token stack for Claude Code against a much smaller token stack for OpenCode before a coding prompt is processed

imageSuggestions.concept: Bar chart comparing ~33k token overhead vs ~7k token overhead
imageSuggestions.altText: Bar chart showing Claude Code sending about 33,000 overhead tokens compared to OpenCode sending about 7,000

imageSuggestions.concept: Diagram of a context window filling up with scaffolding tokens before user code
imageSuggestions.altText: Diagram illustrating how much of a context window is consumed by system prompt and tool definitions before user code is added

imageSuggestions.concept: Screenshot mockup of a debug log showing token counts per request
imageSuggestions.altText: Mockup of a terminal debug log displaying token counts sent in a coding agent request
